result.result:
# This week on agent-office (2026-04-13 → 2026-04-18)

All work on `main` (one unmerged branch `feature/phase-5-telemetry`, already fast-forwarded into main via `3199451`). ~60 commits.

**Apr 13 — Foundations (`bd59458` → `88d3adb`)**
- Phase 1 foundation, Phase 2 agent core (personas/skills/resolver/launcher), Phase 3 memory engine (domain-scoped queries, injector, importer), Phase 4 office UI (React + animated scene, pixel-art sprites).

**Apr 14 — Pixel-art engine extraction + launch preview**
- Extracted the pixel-agents engine into modular pieces: constants/types (`a88a3c6`), sprites (`54fcd13`), tiles (`00cdc7b`), layout (`9df83eb`), core state/renderer/loop (`769983d`), browser asset loader (`fd62f21`). Added `tsconfig.json` (`d460be3`).
- Wired `OfficeCanvas` React wrapper (`c8c8f57`), 25×20 default layout with 7 themed zones (`a4ef81e`), 3-column dashboard (`68467b0`), zone labels, click-coord fix, persona seat pinning.
- claude-mem integration: read-only SQLite adapter (`d109f26`), heuristic persona filter (`e079b4f`), server boot hookup (`3842a50`), launcher context injection + `preview()` (`1c875a4`).
- LaunchPreview flow: `GET /api/office/preview` + full launch (`acdddfa`), store actions (`a0549e3`), component (`27cb1d3`), picker opens preview (`c0f0d86`), readability redesign (`91ae92e`). Launcher spawns Claude Code in an iTerm2 tab (`64ed75e`), then hardened with terminal detection + execFile (`af527f8`).

**Apr 15 — Phase 5 telemetry**
- Phase 5 dashboard merged (`2534692`, merge `3199451`), provider adapters + office state + portfolio stats (`4d9806d`), redesigned picker with provider-aware preview (`42aab52`), local skill roots + launch inventory (`a4cb528`), UTC anchor fix for today-window (`c1a2dc7`).

**Apr 16 — Provider-neutral history + polish**
- `feat: add provider-neutral project history ingestion` (`9c4afb4`) and `doctor` command (`3b9f1a9`). Live-session stability fixes (`a8f6bd4`, `aaa47ed`), codex history enrichment (`fc03de3`), local port resolution from config (`ef1cec2`), licensing/provenance docs (`1e39b01`).

**Apr 18 — Unified memory brief + LaunchWizard + bench harness**
- Codex submission-id matching fix (`1b6fbb5`). Office floor simplified to Boss/Workspace/Dungeon + Fixer (`d5da889`).
- **Persona-scoped memory brief generator** (`4d9a58a`) — the core USP shift.
- Bench harness for brief vs raw-memory token savings (`40c5014`).
- Playwright LinkedIn carousel capture (`01f2a70`); deps added: sqlite-vec, @huggingface/transformers, playwright (`0c3dfbd`); startup/dev launcher scripts (`831f303`).
- README rewrite around unified-memory USP (`18e1cbb`).
- Wired brief into live launch (`17bf243`), rendered in LaunchPreview (`ec56fb9`), exposed unified stats + semantic search and dropped the claude-mem fallback (`2dbef00`), persona memory stats + semantic search in picker (`3c1cf94`), and collapsed the launch flow into a single 4-step `LaunchWizard` modal (`3b6c0b4`).

**Uncommitted / untracked** (not shipped): `bench/`, `scripts/bench-whitepaper.mjs`, `scripts/bench-judge.mjs`, `scripts/bench-aggregate.mjs` — the whitepaper benchmark suite referenced in memory S3761/S3776. Still local.

**Caveats**
- The `$CMEM` stream contains many observations from a different project (lens: pricing, brand-management, Stripe). I ignored those — they don't reflect agent-office shipments.
- "This week" = last 7 days per `git log --since="7 days ago"`; Apr 13 work is right at the edge.
- Decisions like "drop claude-mem fallback" and "single LaunchWizard modal" are inferred from commit messages; I didn't diff the code to confirm scope.
